title: P3: GetStatus does not reflect rxMode under lock (related to one-shot PollRx r7h4.6)
description: GetStatus always returns 0x22. Update to check rxMode under stateLock and return appropriate mode byte (0x52 for RX if rxMode, else 0x22 for STDBY_RC). This was partially addressed in parent but race remains without consistent lock. Codereview finding. Tagged codereview.
